things.name: Acropolis & Parthenon
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage hilltop citadel with the 2,500-year-old Parthenon temple

things.name: Acropolis Museum
things.description: World-class museum displaying the Parthenon sculptures with views up to the rock

things.name: National Archaeological Museum
things.description: World's finest collection of ancient Greek art including the Antikythera Mechanism

things.name: Ancient Agora
things.description: Ancient marketplace with the remarkably preserved Temple of Hephaestus

things.name: Monastiraki
things.description: Vibrant flea market district at the foot of the Acropolis with cafes and bazaars

things.name: Plaka
things.description: Charming old neighbourhood of neoclassical houses at the base of the Acropolis

things.name: Temple of Olympian Zeus
things.description: Colossal ruins of the ancient world's largest temple, begun in 515 BC

things.name: Syntagma Square
things.description: Central square with the Parliament and the Changing of the Evzone Guards ceremony

things.name: Panathenaic Stadium
things.description: Marble stadium that hosted the first modern Olympic Games in 1896

things.name: Cape Sounion & Temple of Poseidon
things.description: Dramatic clifftop temple at the southernmost tip of Attica with Aegean Sea views
